abilities.name: A Stitch in Time
abilities.text: After killing a model, this model may give a Slow or Backtrack token to a model within 6".

abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Buffering
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it may remove a friendly Echo marker within 6". If it does so, make an Echo marker within 3".

actions.name: Tick, Tock
actions.effects: Give the target a Slow token.

triggers.name: Crumble Over Time
triggers.text: When resolving, this action deals +1 damage. If the turn number is 3 or 4, it deals an additional +1 damage.

triggers.name: Leech Strength
triggers.text: This model may remove a token from the target. If it does so, this model heals 1.

actions.name: Stutter Time
actions.effects: Target gains a Backtrack token. If this action receives a raise, place the target anywhere within 2" of its current location.

actions.name: Sever Timeline
actions.effects: Make an Echo marker in base contact with the target, then place the target within 4".

triggers.name: Temporal Distortion
triggers.text: Give this model a Backtrack token.

triggers.name: Catch a Glimpse
triggers.text: Look at the top two cards of your face deck, then place them back in the same order.
